creator: john@jmarshall.id.au
text:
There have been two releases upstream since the version currently in the 
ports tree:

 http://arthurdejong.org/nss-pam-ldapd/release-0-8-11
 http://arthurdejong.org/nss-pam-ldapd/release-0-8-12

The attached patch updates the port to the current release version.

I have installed and tested 0.8.12 on the following platforms.  Please
note that I have *not* tested the PAM component since we don't use that
at all.
